query:
-- 1. ยอดรวม total_amount ใน cache แยก bad_debt_row กับ normal row
SELECT 
  is_bad_debt_row,
  COUNT(*) as row_count,
  SUM(total_amount) as sum_total_amount,
  SUM(bad_debt) as sum_bad_debt_col
FROM debt_collected_cache 
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
GROUP BY is_bad_debt_row;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
-- 1. ยอดรวม total_amount ใน cache แยก bad_debt_row กับ normal row
SELECT 
  is_bad_debt_row,
  COUNT(*) as row_count,
  SUM(total_amount) as sum_total_amount,
  SUM(bad_debt) as sum_bad_debt_col
FROM debt_collected_cache 
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
GROUP BY is_bad_debt_row;
